Our Students Attended Summer School Program in Moscow

23.08.2024

Moscow Language and Culture Summer School Program was held between 19-28 July, within the framework of the Memorandum of Understanding between Ibn Haldun University and RUDN University in Russia.

The 10 day-long program, organized for the students selected based on their GPA,  involved extensive Russian language courses as well as various cultural activities, museum visits and social events.

During the program, our students had to chance to improve their language skills and gained insights into the Russian culture.
